title: Collected Wheel Publications Volume XXVI
author: Bhikkhu Bodhi
description: This book contains seventeen numbers of the renowned Wheel Publication series, dealing with various aspects of the Buddha’s teaching. Wheel Publication: 394–96: Fundamentals of Buddhism—Nyanatiloka Thera 397–98: A Simple Guide to Life—Robert Bogoda 399–01: Buddhism in Myanmar—Roger Bischoff 402–04: Buddhist Ceremonies and Rituals of Sri Lanka—A. G. S. Kariyawasam 405–06: Mahakaccana—Bhikkhu Bodhi 407–08: Nibbana As Living Experience—Lily de Silva 409–11: A Treatise on the Paramis—Bhikkhu Bodhi
